title: CO-001 Secure Holding Area Expansion
description: GSA requested expansion of detention holding capacity from 48 to 72 persons. Requires additional 1800 SF on Level B1 with reinforced concrete cells additional MEP and security systems.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

title: CO-002 Enhanced Blast Resistance Glazing
description: Post-9/11 security requirements updated by GSA requiring all perimeter glazing upgraded from laminated safety glass to blast-resistant glazing rated for 50 psi peak positive pressure per UFC 4-010-01.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

title: CO-003 Generator Fuel Storage Relocation
description: Relocate 2000-gallon diesel AST from north side to code-compliant location at south property line. Includes extended fuel line routing through existing parking structure and secondary containment.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

title: CO-004 HVAC System Upgrade - Courtroom Filtration
description: GSA updated indoor air quality standards requiring MERV-16 filtration in all courtrooms and jury deliberation rooms. Original design specified MERV-13. Requires larger air handling units and structural support upgrades.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

title: CO-005 Fiber Optic Network Infrastructure
description: GSA technology office added requirement for high-density fiber optic backbone throughout building for court video conferencing and federal network connectivity. Not included in original scope.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

title: CO-006 Exterior Granite Veneer Upgrade
description: GSA design review board required upgrade from limestone to granite on primary facade and entry plaza to match National Mall architectural standards.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

title: CO-007 Section 3 Training Lab
description: HUD CDBG grant condition requires dedicated job training facility for Section 3 workers. Addition of 3200 SF training and workforce development space on Level 1.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex
